notes: A reckoning. The phrase 'whispers of infinity' is the gravity center — it lands four times and each lands harder. 'Quarter' is held alone on purpose. Verse 2 is an -ed-rhyme flurry; keep rhyming lines intact so each -ed lands. The song is amber defiance against the algorithm; warm bias throughout, cyan only on the hook itself (both signals converging).

chunks.note: Quarter — single word held 2.37s. One word, one moment.
Been carrying this frequency — the thesis, isolated for breath
whispers of infinity #1 — both signals converge
the -ed flurry — keep each rhyming line intact so head/read/said/misled/bed/thread/bled/fed/dead all land
I chose the road but I cant help where it led — verse 2 payoff, biggest
whispers of infinity #3 — after the 31s breath, hugest of all
kick to a drum — the final landing, last words of the song
